name: Hot & Sour Stir-Fried Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, heat the oil and fry the ginger, garlic, and onion until soft.
2. Add the carrots and green beans and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
3. Add the cabbage, zucchini, salt, sugar, soy sauce, lime juice, and cayenne.
4. Stir-fry for another 2 minutes until all the vegetables are tender but not overcooked.
5. Garnish with green onion and cilantro.
